features: FOUR-SOCKET EXTENSION LEAD WITH SAFETY SHUTTERED SOCKETS: Which automatically close when not in use preventing the insertion of foreign objects for user safety. It offers an affordable and reliable solution for everyday power needs within the home
EXTEND THE REACH OF WALL SOCKETS: The 1 metre cable provides power where you need it the most. Ideal for home offices, bedrooms and living spaces. Certified to BS1363-2 safety standards
OPTION TO WALL-MOUNT FOR ADDITIONAL FLEXIBILITY: Offers a space saving design by keeping the extension lead off the floor with a wall-fixing capability. Ideal for small spaces
A COMPACT AND LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN: Slim, white profile which blends seamlessly with any décor. Allows you to use up to four devices simutaneously
MASTERPLUG'S 1-YEAR MANUFACTURER'S WARRANTY: As well as offering a one-year warranty, Masterplug have a dedicated technical support team, who are there to help you
description: From the manufacturer Masterplug Basics Power Four Socket Extension Lead, 1 Metre, White Providing power where you need it the most This four-socket extension lead eliminates the problem when the number of electrical items outnumber the number of available sockets. With a 1-metre cable, this four-gang extension lead is great to use in the home as well as in the office. More Information Four socket 1-Metre cable 1.0 mm cable 24 x 5.5 x 3 cm (9.5 x 2 x 1 inches) Features Wall fixing capability Giving you the option to mount the extension lead onto the wall, if you are struggling with available ground space. Safe to use As it is manufactured to BS1363-2 and the non-rewireable double socket extension lead has a 13 Amp fuse and can safely reach 3120 Watts, 240 Volts. Slimline appearance With a rounded compact slimline appearance, the four-socket extension lead also has safety shuttered sockets. About Masterplug With over 75 years experience, the Luceco plc brands of Luceco LED lighting, BG Electrical, Masterplug and Ross are market leaders in key electrical categories, offering a "one stop shop" for trade and retail accessories. Masterplug is one of the most recognisable brands in the world and has been at the forefront of Portable Power for many decades. With a head office in London and global offices in four continents, Luceco has an impressive portfolio of over 2,500 product lines and are continually evolving product ranges, aligned to market trends. So, whether you’re looking for the best in LED lighting, top of the range extension leads, stylish socket covers or dimmer switches, Luceco is the brand that you can trust to deliver on quality production and performance.
